kb-health-check.name: KB Health Check
kb-health-check.description: Verifies all 4 knowledge bases (modules-kb, analyzer-kb, chloe-kb, sms-kb) are accessible on GitHub and have content. Posts to Slack if any KB is missing or empty.

runs.details: 🎓 Academy Modules: OK (82.3 KB) | 🎙 Call Analyzer: OK (22.7 KB) | 🤖 Chloe Voice Agent: OK (18.1 KB) | 💬 SMS Playbook: OK (33.5 KB)

leaderboard-digest.name: Weekly Leaderboard Digest
leaderboard-digest.description: Pulls Academy leaderboard data, calculates weekly progress changes, and posts a team training summary to Slack. Shows who completed modules, who improved scores, and who needs to catch up.

runs.details: Posted digest for 1 agents. Leader: Gayden at 61%.

deal-deadline-check.name: Deal Deadline Alert
deal-deadline-check.description: Checks all active deals in Close CRM for upcoming deadlines — EMD due dates, DD expiration, and closing dates within the next 48 hours. Posts alerts to Slack so nothing gets missed.
